lines.speaker: a
lines.text: Adjutant wants the east-road ledger reconciled by dusk.

lines.speaker: b
lines.text: The east-road ledger is three months of guesswork and bloodstains.

lines.speaker: a
lines.text: Then she'll have three months of guesswork by dusk. Move.

lines.speaker: b
lines.text: In the Reach, {a}, quiet just means it hasn't started yet.
